figures.caption: Fig. 1. An overview of how the agentic brain MRI analysis works on an exemplary case.
Fig. 2. Different designs of multi-agent setup
Table 1. Performance of different agent architectures and LLMs on simple segmentation (Task 1) and single-timepoint measurements (Task 2). Best results per task are highlighted with green.

Table 2. Performance of different agent architectures and LLMs on longitudinal response analysis (Task 3). Green cells highlight the best overall result in the task, and the bold text shows the best local performance for each LLM.
